summary.intent: Add a navigation menu to both layout pages with links to the home page and AI metrics page.
summary.outcome: Created a shared Nav.astro component and integrated it into both Layout.astro and AiMetricsLayout.astro, then committed the changes (excluding deleted screenshot files).

repo: Project uses Astro with Tailwind CSS and a dark theme with cyan accent color (text-accent-primary).
Two separate layouts exist: Layout.astro (max-w-[720px], grid layout for market data) and AiMetricsLayout.astro (max-w-[1280px] for AI metrics dashboard).
Root route is '/' (Market page) and AI metrics is at '/ai-metrics'.
Several screenshot PNG files (ai-metrics-final-v2.png, ai-metrics-final.png, etc.) were deleted locally but not committed — likely leftover development artifacts.

code.finding: New shared nav component with active-page highlighting using text-accent-primary for cyan highlight and muted text with hover states for inactive links.
Body changed from flex items-start sm:items-center to flex-col items-center; main content wrapped in a div to accommodate Nav above the grid main element.
Previous max-width was on <main>; restructured to put max-width on a wrapper div so Nav and main share the same container width constraint.

workflow: The /commit skill surfaces full git status and diff as context before creating the commit, allowing selective staging (nav files only, not deleted PNGs).
Verifying final file state with a Read after edits is a useful sanity check before committing.

friction: Untracked deleted PNG screenshot files appeared in git status alongside the intentional nav changes, requiring care to stage only the relevant files.
open_items: Deleted screenshot files (ai-metrics-final-v2.png, ai-metrics-final.png, ai-metrics-fixed.png, ai-metrics-full.png, ai-metrics-real-data.png, single-checkpoint.png) are still untracked deletions — should be committed or restored if intentional/accidental.
